name: Sartor Administradora General de Fondos S.A. - Fondo De Inversion Sartor Leasing Fund
summary: Sartor Administradora General de Fondos S.A. - Fondo De Inversion Sartor Leasing Fund invests in leasing assets. It is managed by Sartor Administradora General de Fondos S.A. The fund seeks to provide investors with returns through investments in a diversified portfolio of leased assets.
